note: v1 fps and microbench data preserved under history.v1. v2 adds perStage per-host data from the render pass (no -nodraw). The fleet runner (task 0.2) branches on schemaVersion to consume perStage.

v1.note: render+sim fps (doom.wad attract demos, best-of-5, -nodraw) before/after the fixed-point inline+int64 change, on the network's weakest devices. End-to-end is within noise everywhere; the real wins are complexity/size/exactness, not fps.

primitiveMicrobench.note: isolated wasm FixedDiv, 2e8 iters, double path vs int64 path, ms (lower=faster). Chosen: int64.

perStage.note: Per-stage ms/frame from the render pass (doom.wad attract demos, best-of-3, no -nodraw). stages: frame-setup+clears, bsp+segs (R_RenderBSPNode, interleaved), planes (R_DrawPlanes), masked (R_DrawMasked). sim: G_Ticker ms/tic. Recorded by bench.mjs schemaVersion 2.
